creative_brief: Close-up of hands holding rich, dark soil with cattle grazing peacefully in soft-focus background, warm golden hour lighting suggesting community connection to land.
primary_text:
When Rachel Ward started selling direct to FarmThru customers, something unexpected happened. Families started asking how they could be part of the farms they bought from. Now Rachel's regenerative beef operation has 47 community supporters. Her cattle graze the same paddocks, but the value stays local instead of flowing to distant shareholders.

No middlemen. Sydney families already collect from the Brookvale hub. We can't promise returns, but we can show you everything.
headline: Customers are buying the farms
description: Own a piece of the farm-direct grocery movement. Be part of it.
